basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut)
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has officially announced the Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 with 02 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website of NIT Calicut. Candidates who meet the age criteria of no upper age limit and hold a Four-year Bachelor's Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines from a recognized University can submit their applications via email up to 5 July 2026. The engagement is purely on a contract basis under the ANRF-sponsored project titled "Communication Efficiency in Federated

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: Four years Bachelor’s Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines from a recognized University. | Desirable: M.Tech Degree in any specialization of Electronics and Communication Engineering. Good understanding of basics of Communication and Signal Processing. | Age Limit: No upper age limit. | Job Location: NIT Calicut

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA (with NET/GATE) Rs. 30,000/- + 20% HRA (without NET/GATE)

how_to_apply: Fill the registration form and submit the duly filled form along with latest CV and soft copies of mark sheets/certificates in a single PDF.
Subject Line: “ANRF ARG Communication Efficiency in FL: Application for Project Associate-1”
Selected candidates will be informed via email for the online interview.
important_instructions: The applicant is responsible for the authenticity of all submitted documents. Candidates already employed must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) at the time of interview. For queries, contact Dr. Nujoom Sageer K (Mobile: 99016553223, Email: [email protected]).
This article strictly follows your preferred structure. Let me know if you need any changes!

Desirable: M.Tech Degree in any specialization of Electronics and Communication Engineering. Good understanding of basics of Communication and Signal Processing. Age Limit: No upper age limit. Job Location: NIT Calicut

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the registration form and submit the duly filled form along with latest CV and soft copies of mark sheets/certificates in a single PDF. Email to: [email protected] and [email protected] Subject Line: “ANRF ARG Communication Efficiency in FL: Application for Project Associate-1” Selected candidates will be informed via email for the online interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Calicut Project Associate-1 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 5 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for NIT Calicut Project Associate?
faq.answer: Total 02 (Two) positions of Project Associate-1 are available.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Associate-1 at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Rs. 37,000/- + 20% HRA (for candidates with CSIR-UGC NET/GATE) and Rs. 30,000/- + 20% HRA for others.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for NIT Calicut Project Associate?
faq.answer: Four years B.Tech/B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines. M.Tech is desirable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of the Project Associate position at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Initially 6 months, extendable up to 3 years based on performance and fund availability.

faq.question: Q6. When is the online interview for NIT Calicut Project Associate-1?
faq.answer: The online interview is tentatively scheduled on 9 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for NIT Calicut ANRF Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Send the application form, CV, and documents in a single PDF to [email protected] and [email protected] with the prescribed subject line.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for NIT Calicut Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no age limit for this position.

faq.question: Q9. Is PhD registration possible for selected candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, the selected candidate is encouraged to register for a Ph.D. at NIT Calicut.

faq.question: Q10. Will TA/DA be provided for the interview at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: No, No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview.
